meaning: n.(匈牙利的货币单位)福林
examples: Realizing that this type of hyperinflation and denomination increase was not sustainable, the Pengo was replaced by the Forint.
At the time of this replacement, the Pengo to Forint exchange, was Four Hundred Octillion to one.
The risk, of course, is that the forint devalues or depreciates.
The markets' reaction was swift: the forint plunged to more than 300 to the euro.
The forint fell to a record low against the euro last week and government bond yields have soared.
